history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, facing upward. The cell directly ahead (row 06 column D) is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe open cell to my right is row 07 column E, which I can reach by turning right and then moving forward on the next step. I will turn right now.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, and the cell ahead in my current facing direction is row 06 column D, which is safe floor. The cell to the right is a wall, so turning right would not help. Moving forward is the only safe progress from here.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m still at row 07 column D, facing upward. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is safe floor, so moving forward is allowed. Right is blocked by a wall at column E, and there is no visible goal yet, so the safest progress is to continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up, and the cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is safe floor. The wall remains to my right, so the correct move is to advance toward the open space.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m still facing up at row 07 column D. The cell in front of me at row 06 column D is safe floor, while the wall at row 07 column E blocks the right side. Since there is no visible goal yet and forward is safe, I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up at row 07 column D. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is lava, so I must not move forward. The cell to my left is open floor, so turning left is the safest way to continue navigating around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left now, and the cell directly ahead is row 07 column C, which is safe floor. Moving forward keeps me on the open path and away from lava, so I should advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up, and the cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is safe floor. Since the goal is visible to the upper right and forward movement continues along the open corridor, the best next step is to move ahead.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up, and the cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is safe floor. Moving forward keeps me progressing toward the goal area while avoiding lava, so I should continue straight.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is safe. Since I am in a vertical corridor with walls blocking the top, moving forward is the correct safe step toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The row above is now a wall line, so moving forward would be blocked. I need to reorient to continue navigating toward the goal at F5; turning right will let me face toward the open path to the east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right. The cell directly ahead is safe and moves me toward the open area and the goal at B5. I should advance rather than turn.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
